creator: gautamnath1@gmail.com
text:
www/linux-brave crashed on opening of web page mail.google.com with some errors as "ERROR:udev_watcher.cc(51)] Failed to initialize a udev monitor" and core dump file of "BatteryStatusNo.core".
On starting of brave-browser gives error " /usr/local/bin/brave-browser: /usr/local/bin/brave-watch: not found "
My system is "FreeBSD gnfreepc 14.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.2-RELEASE releng/14.2-n269506-c8918d6c7412 GENERIC amd64 1402000 1402000" and on latest package system
